candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line shown separately above operating profit and outside the already selected COGS bucket rows ('Investment property management costs', 'Operating Expense - Balancing value', 'Personnel Expenses'). It appears at the same operating-expense level rather than as a sub-component nested inside one selected parent row, so it should be added separately to avoid omitting operating D&A.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
